settings.title: Settings
settings.feedback_error_message: Please try again in a moment.

chat.initial_greeting: Hi, I'm Mitra. I'm here to listen. How are you feeling today?

dashboard.crisis_subtitle: Crisis language detected. Immediate help available 24/7.
dashboard.crisis_footer: You are not alone. Tap any resource above to get immediate help.
dashboard.help_prompt: What can I help you with today?
dashboard.strategy_subtitle: Based on your latest mood, here are matching MindSpace activities.
dashboard.fallback_history: Start chatting to build your history

welcome.message: A private space to check in, reflect, and get calm, practical support.
welcome.sub_message: Mitra is your AI companion for emotional well-being. Share how you feel and receive supportive guidance, anytime.

mood_tracker.title: How are you feeling right now?

community.title: Community Support
community.subtitle: Anonymous peer support
community.no_posts: No posts yet. Be the first to share.

mindspace.title: MindSpace
mindspace.subtitle: Pick from the list. Selected action starts on a full guide page.
mindspace.moodmaps_summary: Discover emotional experiences people associate with places and find calm or peaceful locations.
mindspace.alert_msg: MoodMaps currently does not support anonymous access. Would you like to continue? Please enjoy.
mindspace.error_msg: Please try again in a moment.

breathing-box.title: Breathing Exercise
breathing-box.summary: Slow box breathing to settle your nervous system.

breathing-478.title: 4-7-8 Breathing
breathing-478.summary: Use structured breathing to reduce anxiety quickly.

muscle-relax.title: Muscle Relaxation
muscle-relax.summary: Release stress by tensing and relaxing each muscle group.

grounding-54321.title: 5-4-3-2-1 Grounding
grounding-54321.summary: Bring attention to your senses and return to the present.

name-objects.title: Color Hunt
name-objects.summary: Use visual scanning to break spiraling thoughts.

temperature-reset.title: Temperature Reset
temperature-reset.summary: Use cold sensation to interrupt panic intensity.

journaling-freewrite.title: Journaling
journaling-freewrite.summary: Get thoughts out of your head and onto paper.

thought-reframe.title: Thought Reframe
thought-reframe.summary: Challenge negative thoughts with balanced thinking.

gratitude-3.title: 3 Gratitudes
gratitude-3.summary: Shift attention toward small sources of safety and hope.

talk-it-out.title: Talk It Out
talk-it-out.summary: Reach a trusted person with a clear support ask.

voice-note-release.title: Voice Note Release
voice-note-release.summary: Speak freely to release pressure and hear yourself clearly.

support-script.title: Ask for Support Script
support-script.summary: Use a ready message when words are hard to find.

tiny-wins-activation.title: Tiny Wins Activation
tiny-wins-activation.summary: Pick one tiny task to rebuild momentum when energy feels low.

anger-cooldown-reset.title: Anger Cooldown Reset
anger-cooldown-reset.summary: Release heat in your body before responding to a trigger.

joy-anchor-snapshot.title: Joy Anchor Snapshot
joy-anchor-snapshot.summary: Capture one good moment so your mind can return to it later.

guide.press_start_ready: Press Start when you are ready.
guide.press_start_box: Press Start to begin the Breathing Exercise.
guide.press_start_478: Press Start for a guided 4-7-8 session.
guide.press_start_pmr: Press Start to begin Progressive Muscle Relaxation.
guide.press_start_grounding: Press Start to begin the 5-4-3-2-1 Grounding exercise.
guide.press_start_color_hunt: Press Start to begin Color Hunt.
guide.hold_softly: Hold softly. Relax your jaw and shoulders.
guide.between_box_1: Nice. Let's do this one more.
guide.between_box_2: Great. Let's do this one more last time.
guide.box_done: Great job. You completed all 3 rounds.
guide.478_done: Excellent. You completed 3 rounds of 4-7-8 breathing.
guide.pmr_done: Session Complete. Notice how your body feels now.
guide.pmr_msg_3: Notice how your muscles feel softer.
guide.grounding_done: Grounding Complete. Notice how you feel.
guide.color_hunt_done: Color Hunt Complete. You did it.
guide.color_msg_3: Look around for the next color.
guide.color_msg_4: You are doing great. Stay curious.
guide.saved_offline: Saved offline. Will sync when online.
